rows.label: tev000192_MSG0001
rows.name: Fancy meeting you here, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0002
rows.name:
How I wish we could have a
pleasant conversation over a
nice cup of tea for once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0003
rows.name:
But unfortunately, I need to attend
a new weapons test after this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0004
rows.name:
It's not enough to simply check up
on the Arms— I also need to keep
up with our arms manufacturers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0005
rows.name:
Speaking of which, what's your weapon of choice?
Do you prefer to fight from afar with ranged
weapons, or up close with melee weapons?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_JNK0010
rows.name: Ranged Weapons

rows.label: tev000192_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say you prefer the enemy
not see you coming.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_JNK0020
rows.name: Melee Weapons

rows.label: tev000192_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say you prefer getting
up close and personal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0006
rows.name: Hmm. A contemporary choice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0007
rows.name:
I imagine a preference for ranged combat
would quickly become ingrained in anyone
trying to survive on this planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0008
rows.name:
One would be nearly helpless against
the flying indigens here without
some sort of projectile weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0009
rows.name:
Nor would it make much sense to
face a flightless indigen head-on
when there are safer options.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0010
rows.name: Your choice is a prudent one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0011
rows.name:
Is that right? I hadn't realized you
were a[ST:gender p1= man p2= woman ] of such rarefied tastes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0012
rows.name:
In the right hands, a melee weapon can
be more reliable than any firearm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0013
rows.name: And no weapon more so than the sword.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0014
rows.name:
I once knew a man whose sword
techniques were beyond compare. I
wish he was here so you could meet him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'm sure his skill would make you
even more enamored with the sword.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0016
rows.name:
*ahem* Well, that's enough shop talk
for now. The test is about to begin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0017
rows.name:
Since you've come this far, is there
anything you'd like me to request
from the AMs? Don't hold back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_JNK0110
rows.name: More Variety

rows.label: tev000192_SEL0111
rows.name:
Explain that you'd like a
wider range of weapons.

rows.label: tev000192_JNK0120
rows.name: Better Prices

rows.label: tev000192_SEL0121
rows.name:
Say that you'd like weapons
to be more affordable.

rows.label: tev000192_JNK0130
rows.name: Custom Gear

rows.label: tev000192_SEL0131
rows.name:
Express your desire
for custom equipment.

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0018
rows.name:
So you'd like to be able to choose
from a wider array of weaponry, eh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'm sure you can imagine what a challenge
it is to develop new armaments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0020
rows.name:
I will convey your message, although I doubt
they can accomplish that goal without the
cooperation of BLADE operatives such as yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0021
rows.name:
There's no doubt that lowering
prices would put higher quality
gear into the hands of more BLADEs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0022
rows.name:
I'll be sure to ask them to
do what they can to make their
wares more affordable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0023
rows.name:
But keep in mind these are not
mere merchants—they also need
funds to R&D new equipment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0024
rows.name:
Since future weapons-development costs are funded
by the sales of current weapons, they may not be
able to accommodate your request so easily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0025
rows.name:
Still, I'll see what I can do.
Just don't hold it against them
if the prices fail to drop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0026
rows.name:
Well. It seems you've a
real mind for weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0027
rows.name:
I'm sure the technicians would be delighted
to accommodate you, though I doubt the bean
counters would be nearly so pleased.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0028
rows.name:
After all, they've been focusing their
efforts on bringing high-quality weapons
to as many BLADE operatives as possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0029
rows.name:
Custom equipment would be impossible
to mass- produce, and could also
be prohibitively expensive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0030
rows.name:
But such a request might be more feasible
once we've finished building NLA and have
become more accustomed to life here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000192_MSG0031
rows.name:
Regardless, I'll make the request.
Feel free to start holding your
breath in anticipation![ST:wait ]
